multifunctional headphone i have been looking for a set of headphones that i could use to go to sleep ; the ones i were using were wired bluetooth earbuds that would hurt my ears cuz the buds would be pushed in when i sleep on my side. not only are the earbuds uncomfortable, i constantly lose the earbud attachments. the battery life is at least 8 hours in one charge. the headband wireless headphone solved the issue of buds getting into my ear canal and the little mushroom earbud attachments that i kept losing. the headband headphone came with a user manual and a usb charger. the controls are in the front of the headband and right behind the controls is the charging access. all i did was charge the headband headphone when it came in, pushed the power button til it turned on, haven ’ t done anything to it ever since. since the main use of the headband headphone m, for me, was to use it in my slee, the neat part of it is that it can double as a sleeping mask - yes the controls ended up on my forehead but it wasn ’ t bothersome. as for the fit, the products is a one size
